description:
## Features
- Added a `Patches` settings entry, allowing direct access to the custom patch settings page from the bottom of the Gboard settings page.
- Added a settings preview image mechanism that supports long-pressing items in the settings page to view the actual preview images.
- Added the `Clipboard Retention` patch, allowing adjustment of clipboard retention time, item count limits, and preview line count, with support for showing creation time and expiry countdown.
- Added the `Settings Homepage Override` patch, allowing switching between the new and legacy Gboard settings styles.
- Added `Clipboard Entity Extraction`: enables `Clipboard > Show information extracted from recently copied text, such as addresses, phone numbers, and other items`.
- Added `Clipboard Item Edit`: shows `Edit` when long-pressing a clipboard item.
- Added `Grammar Checker`: enables `Text correction > Grammar check`.
- Added `Inline Suggestions`: enables `Text correction > Smart Compose`.
- Added `Key Shape Selection`: enables rounded keys in `Theme details > Key shape`.

## Build And Release
- Upgraded the Morphe toolchain and release-related dependencies.
- Upgraded the package versions of `app.morphe.patches` plugin, `morphe-patcher`, `Gradle wrapper`, `Smali`, `Gson`, and `semantic-release`.
- Changed the semantic-release backmerge package from `@saithodev/semantic-release-backmerge` to `@cleyrop-org/semantic-release-backmerge`.

## Note
- Currently supports only the official Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a.

## 功能
- 新增 `Patches` 設定入口，可直接從 Gboard 設定頁底部進入自訂 patch 設定頁。
- 新增設定頁預覽圖機制，支援在設定頁長按項目查看實際預覽畫面。
- 新增 `Clipboard Retention` patch，可調整剪貼簿保留時間、數量上限、預覽行數，並支援顯示建立時間與到期倒數。
- 新增 `Settings Homepage Override` patch，可切換新版或舊版 Gboard 設定樣式。
- 新增 `Clipboard Entity Extraction`：啟用 `剪貼簿 > 顯示從最近複製文字中攝取的資訊，例如地址、電話號碼和其他項目`。
- 新增 `Clipboard Item Edit`：長按剪貼簿項目時顯示`編輯`。
- 新增 `Grammar Checker`：啟用 `修正和建議 > 文法檢查` 。
- 新增 `Inline Suggestions`：啟用 `修正和建議 > 智慧撰寫` 。
- 新增 `Key Shape Selection`：啟用圓角按鍵，`主題詳情 > 按鍵形狀` 。

## 建置與發佈
- 升級 Morphe toolchain 與 release 相關依賴。
- 升級 `app.morphe.patches` plugin、`morphe-patcher`、`Gradle wrapper`、`Smali、Gson` 與 `semantic-release`套件版本。
- semantic-release backmerge 套件由 `@saithodev/semantic-release-backmerge` 改為 `@cleyrop-org/semantic-release-backmerge`。

## 注意
- 目前只支援官方 Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a
